transcript.content: 这两个问题我已经针对性修了： 1. 点击有时没反应 原因是点击后才同步去跑命令，窗口要等结果回来才出现。 现在改成： - 点击后立刻打开小窗口 - 如果有缓存先显示缓存 - 没缓存就先显示 `Loading…` - 后台再异步刷新内容
`Ctx: error` 的意思很直接： `独立扩展在刷新 context 大小时失败了。`
已经补上了。 现在独立扩展会把这几种情况明确分开：

# Context Refresh Failed workspace: /Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core Command failed: /Applications/Visual Studio Code.app/Contents/Frameworks/Code Helper (Plugin).app/Contents/MacOS/Code Helper (Plugin) scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js --format size Each VS Code window refreshes its own workspace independently.
根因就是你贴出来的这句： ```text /Applications/Visual Studio Code.app/.../Code Helper (Plugin) scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js --format size ```

# Context Refresh Failed workspace: /Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core Command failed: /usr/local/bin/node scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js --format size Each VS Code window refreshes its own workspace independently.
我已经把这个问题修到根上了。 根因不是 node 路径了，而是状态栏刷新走了完整 GC 判定链路，导致扩展里看起来像“点击没反应 / 刷新失败”。现在我把状态栏和详情窗口改成了 `host-only fast path`：
为什么 codex插件里是 486k，你给的是258k？
因为我这里的监控脚本把窗口上限 `主动 clamp 到了 258k`，而 Codex 插件显示的是它自己上报的 `reported model_context_window`，大约 `486k`。 代码里就是这么写的：

decision.archive_summary: The conversation moved from earlier resolved VS Code context-refresh failures to the current active issue: a discrepancy between the Codex plugin's displayed context size (~486k, from reported model_context_window) and the assistant's 258k value (from a locally clamped monitoring/window limit). The latest user reply indicates they want the assistant to proceed on that discrepancy topic.
decision.reasoning_summary: Use continue because the latest user turn still follows directly from the active size-discrepancy topic, not a new subject. Earlier refresh-failure debugging and the unrelated click-response fix are resolved/off-topic for the next turn, so they can leave the raw prompt. Keep the semantic content of t10-t11 pinned because the next response likely depends on that exact discrepancy explanation, while the latest user turn is automatically retained by the runtime.

The latest user reply indicates they want the assistant to proceed on that discrepancy topic.

Keep the semantic content of t10-t11 pinned because the next response likely depends on that exact discrepancy explanation, while the latest user turn is automatically retained by the runtime.
